title: tigridia heliantha
intro: Tigridia heliantha, also known as the Mexican daffodil or tiger flower, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. The plant's tuber has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds, infections, and various other health issues. The health benefits of Tigridia heliantha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and prevent the growth of bacteria and fungi. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin conditions.
